query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_projects, COUNT(CASE WHEN status='done' THEN 1 END) as done, COUNT(CASE WHEN status='processing' THEN 1 END) as processing, COUNT(CASE WHEN status='failed' THEN 1 END) as failed FROM khayal_projects; SELECT COUNT(*) as total_scenes, COUNT(CASE WHEN imageUrl != '' THEN 1 END) as with_image FROM khayal_scenes; SELECT COUNT(*) as stuck_jobs FROM video_jobs WHERE status IN ('pending','processing') AND lastHeartbeat < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 MINUTE);
